about.name: Shaurya Harkar
about.title: Web Designer & Full-Stack Developer
about.tagline: Designing terminal-inspired interfaces and shipping full-stack products with polish.
about.bio: I build immersive digital experiences that balance visual identity, responsive UI, and dependable backend thinking. My work blends product design instincts with implementation discipline so ideas move cleanly from concept to deployment.
about.availability: Available for freelance, contract, and full-time opportunities.
highlights: Terminal-inspired interfaces with strong visual direction
End-to-end delivery from UI systems to backend integration
Performance-minded builds focused on clarity and maintainability

stats.label: Focus
stats.value: Flutter applications, AI integration for problem solving

experience.summary: Leading product delivery across interface design, frontend architecture, and scalable service integrations.
bullets: Designed and shipped responsive product surfaces that improved usability across desktop and mobile workflows.
Built Node.js service layers and reusable frontend patterns that accelerated delivery across multiple releases.
Turned complex product requirements into clean implementation plans with a strong focus on maintainable systems.

experience.summary: Worked across modern frontend migration, internal tooling, and quality improvements for production releases.
bullets: Collaborated on modern React pipelines, improving performance, accessibility, and implementation consistency.
Developed internal tooling and testing support for cross-platform application releases.
Partnered with senior engineers to translate evolving product needs into dependable frontend components.

education.university: Pimpri Chinchwad College Of Engineering, Akurdi

projects.name: Resume Terminal
projects.description: A cinematic resume website that presents professional experience inside a custom terminal-inspired interface.
projects.outcome: Transforms a standard resume into an immersive portfolio presentation with strong personal branding.

projects.name: Algorand App
projects.description: A decentralized application concept focused on stateful workflows, cryptographic interactions, and clear user flows.
projects.outcome: Explores blockchain product UX with a stronger emphasis on accessibility and structured frontend patterns.

projects.name: WhatsApp Bot
projects.description: An automation-first messaging workflow designed to triage requests, coordinate queues, and reduce manual overhead.
projects.outcome: Improves response handling through systemized message routing and backend orchestration.

contact.cta: Open for collaborations where strong design and dependable engineering need to work together.
